nasb.text: however, in the church I desire to speak five words with my mind so that I may instruct others also, rather than ten thousand words in a tongue.

esv.text: Nevertheless, in church I would rather speak five words with my mind in order to instruct others, than ten thousand words in a tongue.

cnv.text: 但在教會中，我寧願用理智說五句話去教導人，勝過用方言說萬句話。

ccb.text: 但在教会中我宁可用悟性说五句教导人的话，胜过说万句别人不懂的方言。

csbs.text: 但是在教会里，为了要教导别人，我宁愿用我的理性说五句话，也不愿用殊言说万句话。
